channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Larry David Roasts RFK Jr. in Newest Life, Larry, and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
item.description: 🎶 Larry David brings the laughs in latest episode of 'Life, Larry, and the Pursuit of Unhappiness'! 😂 #CantStopLaughing #MusicNews

item.title: Ariana Grande Surprises Fans as Ty Dolla $ign Joins Eternal Sunshine Tour to Duet ‘Safety Net’
item.description: Turn up the heat 🔥 Ariana Grande + Ty Dolla $ign = epic duet on #EternalSunshineTour! 🎶 #ArianaGrande #TyDollaSign

item.title: Bright Eyes & The Lumineers cover The Felice Brothers for new tribute comp ‘Felice County Fair’
item.description: 🌟 Bright Eyes & The Lumineers team up for a rootsy tribute on ‘Felice County Fair’ album! 🎶 #NewMusicAlert #MusicCollab

item.title: Hopscotch Fest Announces 2026 Lineup
item.description: 🎉 Let the countdown begin! 2026 lineup for Hopscotch Fest is here! 🎶 Who's ready for the music madness? #Hopscotch2026 🎸✨

item.title: Bill Callahan Is Entering the Audiobook Space
item.description: 📚 Bill Callahan’s storytelling takes a new twist! 🎶 Excited to dive into his audiobook journey! 🌟 #BillCallahan #AudiobookRevolution
